g.text: Never use .innerHTML with content provided by a user (like a comment or a
username). If a user enters malicious <script> code, .innerHTML will execute it,
allowing the user to attack your website and its visitors.

Door Bell (button) -- Static Object, pushing it does nothing
Event -- " Ding Dong " ; it is a signal that the doorbell sends when pushed
Event listener -- Person inside the house whose job is to listen for the doorbell
Event handler -- action that person takes when they hear the "ding-dong"
